title: Sub-goal 8.3 — AWS Transform orchestration
summary: Sub-goal 8.3 ships as the v0.1 wave planner. Pure-Python, deterministic, zero-cost. Consumes the MigrationScope from FORA-82 (8.1) and the DependencyGraph from FORA-83 (8.2); emits a sequenced WavePlan with pre-flight, cycle-break, cluster-break, tier waves, cutover, and validation. 24/24 ACs green in 18.73 ms; canonical fixture produces 7 waves (1 preflight + 4 tier + cutover + validation) covering 18 files (4 skipped).

patch.comment: FORA-84 / Sub-goal 8.3 shipped as v0.1 wave planner. 24/24 ACs green; 7-wave WavePlan for the canonical fixture (18 files scheduled, 4 skipped, 6 high-risk, $0 spend, 0.5 ms runtime). Artefacts: forge/8.3/{aws-transform-orchestration.md, wave-plan.json, wave-plan.md} and agents/refactor/evidence/smoke_wave_*/. The orchestrator orchestrates AWS Transform — does not rebuild. Every WaveCommand.via + WaveGate.seam names an existing FORA seam (CCB v1 / FORA-126.5 dispatch / FORA-194 canary probe / FORA-128 secrets / FORA-36 audit / Jira MCP). v0.2 (post `aws-transform-agent` hire) is the executor; v0.1 emits the plan. Hand-off: FORA-85 (8.4 migration planner + Jira) consumes WavePlan.waves + cycle_breaks + cluster_breaks; contract documented in forge/8.3/aws-transform-orchestration.md §10. Surfaced one upstream finding: agents/refactor/dependency_graph.py `attach_risk_and_tier_to_services` crashes on `<unassigned>` services — deferring fix to next FORA-83 wake. Requesting Board confirmation on the orchestrate-not-rebuild posture before FORA-85 fires.

payload.prompt: Sub-goal 8.3 (AWS Transform orchestration) ships v0.1: a pure-Python wave planner that consumes MigrationScope (8.1) + DependencyGraph (8.2) and emits a sequenced WavePlan. The orchestrator orchestrates AWS Transform — does not rebuild. Every wave's commands route through existing FORA seams (CCB v1 dispatch, canary probe, secrets MCP, audit). 24/24 ACs green; 7 waves for the canonical fixture. Approve to unblock FORA-85 (8.4 migration planner + Jira) which consumes the WavePlan. Decline with reason if you want changes to the wave-sequencing algorithm or the orchestrate-not-rebuild posture before FORA-85 fires.

follow_up_to_f85.comment: FORA-84 / 8.3 wave planner shipped in_review. FORA-85 (8.4 migration planner + Jira) is unblocked. The WavePlan contract is documented in forge/8.3/aws-transform-orchestration.md §10. Use `from agents.refactor import plan_waves, render_wave_plan` to drive the Jira epic / story / release-ticket emission. Apply the same orchestrate-not-rebuild posture: emit Jira fields through the MCP, never rebuild Jira locally.
